portal_accountant.title: Accountant Portal

workflow_guides.title: Clinical Workflow Guides
workflow_guides.no_steps_mapped: No clinical workflow steps are mapped to your role in this guide. Contact your administrator if you need access documentation.
workflow_guides.no_steps_role: No steps listed for your role in this workflow.
workflow_guides.compare_title: Quick Reference: Workflow Comparison by Role
workflow_guides.compare_cashier_opd: Consultation fee after Front Desk registration; pay orders before Lab/Pharmacy
workflow_guides.compare_fd_opd: Register first; after payment, add to OPD Queue
workflow_guides.compare_lab_ipd: Deliver results to ward (billed to tab)
workflow_guides.compare_discharge_emg: Stabilize → settle bill → discharge or admit

opd.title: Outpatient Department
opd.description: Front Desk registration, Cashier consultation fee, then Front Desk OPD queue — followed by Nurse triage, Doctor consultation, Lab/Radiology, Pharmacy, and discharge.
opd.roles: Front Desk · Cashier · Nurse · Doctor · Lab · Pharmacy

ipd.title: Inpatient Department
ipd.description: Doctor admission request, Cashier deposit, ADT bed assignment, ward nursing, daily rounds, Clinical Discharge, Financial Discharge.
ipd.roles: Cashier · Front Desk · ADT · Doctor · Nurse · Lab · Pharmacy

emg.title: Emergency / A&E
emg.description: Prepayment bypassed. Rapid Front Desk registration, concurrent Nurse vitals + Doctor treatment, retrospective bill settlement.
emg.roles: Front Desk · Doctor · Nurse · Lab · Pharmacy · Cashier

opd.title: Outpatient (OPD) Process
opd.tip_full: Tip: Monitor real-time flow in the OPD Queue. Patient stages: Registered → Triage → Waiting Doctor → In Consultation → Completed. Entry order: register at Front Desk → pay consultation fee at Cashier → return to Front Desk for the OPD queue.
opd.tip_role: Your steps in the outpatient flow. Full team coordination happens in the OPD Queue.
opd.payment_note: Note: If orders are NOT paid at the Cashier, Lab and Pharmacy will not process them. Always confirm payment before investigations begin.

ipd.title: Inpatient (IPD) Process
ipd.key_principle: Key Principle: Patient cannot physically leave until both Clinical Discharge (Doctor) and Financial Discharge (Cashier) are completed.
ipd.discharge_note: Reminder: Clinical Discharge = Doctor (medical fitness). Financial Discharge = Cashier (bill settlement). Both required before patient leaves.

emg.title: Emergency / A&E Process
emg.critical_rule: Critical Rule: For emergency patients, the "Emergency / Waiver" checkbox MUST be selected at registration. This activates the entire prepayment bypass.
emg.visibility_note: Visibility: Front Desk and Nurse Station dashboards show a real-time "Active Emergency" widget with every patient currently in A&E.

wallet_page.title: Patient Wallet & Cashless HUB
wallet_page.subtitle: Pre-paid virtual wallets · Cash & MoMo top-ups · Instant service deductions
wallet_page.gbpay_desc: When a patient sends MoMo/OM to their wallet QR code via GBPay, the balance is credited automatically within seconds. No manual intervention needed.
wallet_page.search_ph: Search by patient name, phone, ID, or QR token…
wallet_page.create_wallet_hint: Create a wallet to enable top-ups, or skip if not needed.
wallet_page.empty_matched_no_wallet: Patient(s) matched your search but have no wallet yet. Use the prompt above to create one, or search again.
wallet_page.empty_no_match: No patients matched "{{q}}". Try another name, phone, or patient ID.
wallet_page.empty_no_wallets: No wallets yet. Search for a patient by name above — you can choose whether to create a wallet.
wallet_page.modal_create_body_plural: The following patients were found but do not have a wallet yet. Create one to enable cashless top-ups, or choose Not now to skip.
wallet_page.modal_create_body_singular: The following patient was found but does not have a wallet yet. Create one to enable cashless top-ups, or choose Not now to skip.
wallet_page.search_patient_ph: Type patient name, phone, or ID…
wallet_page.search_patient_hint: Search active patients. If no wallet exists, you will be asked before one is created.
wallet_page.topup_hint: Receive physical cash from the patient and load into their pre-paid wallet. An audit trail is recorded automatically.
wallet_page.qr_scan_hint: Patient scans this code to top-up via MTN MoMo or Orange Money through GBPay.

credit_account.title: Credit Account
credit_account.suggested_policy: Suggested: reminders at 7 / 14 / 30 days, escalate to collections after 60 days, write-off only with Director approval (90+ days).
credit_account.no_charges: No charges linked to this account.
credit_account.js_escalate_body: Escalate this credit account to collections? This will flag it for high-priority recovery.

payment_validity.title: Payment validity
payment_validity.subtitle: Set how long paid cashier codes stay valid and how many OPD registrations each payment type allows. Consultation rules can blend with the doctor's last Follow up → Next consultation choice from the consultation form. For consultation and general PAY codes, the first OPD visit on a code does not count toward Max uses; counting starts after that visit.
payment_validity.policy_system_only_desc: use validity days from this screen.
payment_validity.policy_doctor_blend_desc: compare system days with the last documented follow-up interval (from consultation, before the ticket was paid) and take the tighter or looser value when follow-up is set.
payment_validity.policy_doctor_overrides_desc: follow-up days replace the system value when present.
payment_validity.policy_system_overrides_desc: ignore follow-up for this payment kind.
payment_validity.empty: No rules yet — use "Sync kinds from catalog".

tax_hub_page.dgi_desc: Semicolon format: monthly declaration and annual summary.

tax_hub_page.tax_params_desc: NIU, TVA rate, employer CNPS % (financials screen).
tax_hub_page.csv_alt_desc: Comma-separated extract (gross, IRPP, CNPS, council, net). For the semicolon DGI-style file, use

diag_handover.ready_hint: Print the official formatted report and give it to the patient at collection.
diag_handover.no_result_hint: Enter and save results in the template workbench before printing for the patient.
diag_handover.empty_fields_hint: Template saved but result fields are still empty — open templates, complete findings / impression, and save again to enable printing.
diag_handover.pending_correction: This result is unlocked for correction — print after the corrected version is saved.
diag_handover.print_all_title: Print all results for this code
diag_handover.print_all_hint: {{count}} completed report(s) ready — opens one combined PDF-style printout for patient handover.

laboratory_report_view.revision_validate_hint: edit on the validate-by-code screen and resubmit. Superseded versions appear struck through for the doctor.
laboratory_report_view.revision_templates_after: for this patient, re-enter the panel, and save — the same registry row will update. Superseded versions appear struck through for the doctor.
laboratory_report_view.validate_return_action: Validate by code → Return for correction
laboratory_report_view.return_opd_after: : unlocks this line, opens the validate screen to edit, and after resubmit the doctor sees old text in red strikethrough with the new result below.
laboratory_report_view.return_standalone_unlocks: Unlocks this standalone registry row and opens
laboratory_report_view.return_standalone_after: so you can re-save the same row. After resubmit, the doctor sees prior text struck through with the new result below.
laboratory_report_view.prior_versions_title: Prior versions (superseded — as shown to doctors)
laboratory_report_view.prior_versions_hint: Each block is an earlier result replaced after correction. Text is shown struck through on the patient chart and in clinical views.
laboratory_report_view.prompt_reason: Optional note for the audit log (reason for return):

laboratory_templates.suggest_default: A template was suggested from the prescribed test.

laboratory_templates.attach_hint: Attach scanned reports or result PDFs/images. Consulting doctors can view these on the patient chart and lab report.

laboratory_templates.conclusion_ph: Overall interpretation, recommendations, or clinical comments…

patient_duplicates.title: Merge patients
patient_duplicates.intro: Candidates match on first name + last name + phone + DOB/age (same rule as registration). Review before deleting — run node scripts/dedupe-patients-by-name.js for CSV export, then --apply after sign-off.
patient_duplicates.no_groups: No duplicate identity groups found among active patients.
patient_duplicates.groups_count: {{count}} duplicate group(s). Keep the lowest ID (oldest registration) unless clinical records indicate otherwise.

payslip.name: Name / Nom:

payslip.tax_free_hdr: Tax-Free Allowances / Indemnités Non Imposables (Roster-based — not subject to CNPS / IRPP)

consultation_ack_not_assigned.title: Patient not assigned to you
consultation_ack_not_assigned.session_hint: If you still need to see this chart (e.g. covering for a colleague), confirm below. This choice is recorded for the current session only.

follow_up_opd_blocked.title: Follow-up consultation not allowed
follow_up_opd_blocked.intro_suffix: The patient must obtain a new consultation payment at the cashier before you can consult again.
follow_up_opd_blocked.no_errors: No follow-up visit could be registered under the current rules.
follow_up_opd_blocked.step1: Ask the patient to pay for a new consultation at the cashier (or emergency desk if applicable).
follow_up_opd_blocked.step2: After payment, register the visit on the OPD queue and proceed with vitals as usual.
follow_up_opd_blocked.step3: To allow follow-up under the same payment code later, end a consultation with "Patient may return for a follow-up consultation…" checked.

radiology_config.title: Radiology configuration
radiology_config.name: Name
radiology_config.footer_note: Individual imaging tests are managed in the {{catalog}} (category: {{category}}). Exam report templates: {{templates}}.

radiology_report_view.edit_validate_resubmit: edit on the validate-by-code screen and resubmit. Superseded versions appear struck through for the doctor.
radiology_report_view.edit_templates_resubmit: open {{templates}} for this patient, re-enter the panel, and save — the same registry row will update. Superseded versions appear struck through for the doctor.
radiology_report_view.prior_versions: Prior versions (superseded — as shown to doctors)
radiology_report_view.prior_versions_hint: Each block is an earlier result replaced after correction. Text is shown struck through on the patient chart and in clinical views.
radiology_report_view.attachments_hint: Scans and images uploaded by radiology — visible to the consulting doctor on the patient chart.
radiology_report_view.return_opd_hint: Same as Validate by code → Return for correction: unlocks this line, opens the validate screen to edit, and after resubmit the doctor sees old text in red strikethrough with the new result below.
radiology_report_view.return_standalone_hint: Unlocks this standalone registry row and opens Radiology templates so you can re-save the same row. After resubmit, the doctor sees prior text struck through with the new result below.
radiology_report_view.prompt_reason: Optional note for the audit log (reason for return):

radiology_templates.prefill_validation: Prefilling from validation · Code {{code}} · Order item #{{oi}}
radiology_templates.suggest_text: A template was suggested from the prescribed test.
radiology_templates.hero_desc: Choose a panel from the library, enter results with reference-aware flags, preview, then save to the radiology registry (or to the linked OPD order when opened from validation).
radiology_templates.search_ph: Search by name, code, or category…
radiology_templates.select_test_hint: Pick any template from the library. Patient fields and conclusion apply to preview and save. Numeric fields show high / low hints against reference ranges when defined.
radiology_templates.attach_hint: Attach X-rays, scans, or imaging PDFs. The consulting doctor can view these on the patient chart and radiology report.
radiology_templates.attach_limits: Up to 8 files · 12 MB each · images or PDF
radiology_templates.conclusion_ph: Overall interpretation, recommendations, or clinical comments…

js.suggest_html: Suggested template {{name}} from the prescribed exam. Patient and doctor stay fixed; pick another panel if needed.
js.linked_order_html: Linked order · Service code {{code}} · Item #{{oi}} — {{item}}. Patient fields prefilled; results save to this line.
js.correction_html: Correction mode · Updating registry row #{{id}}. Open the same template panel, adjust values, then save.
js.toast_select_test: Select an exam from the library first.
js.saved_upload_failed: Report saved (# {{id}}) but file upload failed: {{err}}

pharmacy_dispense_warn.title: Expiry warning
pharmacy_dispense_warn.alert_body: You are about to dispense stock that is past its expiry date. This action should only proceed with pharmacist approval.
pharmacy_dispense_warn.confirm_override: Override expiry warning and dispense anyway?

pharmacy_nursing_requests.title: Nursing requests
pharmacy_nursing_requests.help: Use Dispense & deduct stock when handing items to nursing — this updates inventory automatically.
pharmacy_nursing_requests.dispensed_banner: Dispensed — stock has been deducted from inventory.
pharmacy_nursing_requests.dispense_hint: Hand over the items above, then click below. Quantities will be removed from pharmacy stock.
pharmacy_nursing_requests.dispense_confirm: Dispense this request and deduct stock from inventory?
pharmacy_nursing_requests.pending_stock_banner: Marked as dispensed but stock was not deducted yet. Use the button below to complete dispensing.

pharmacy_po_detail.expired_warning: Some lines reference products with expired stock on hand. Confirm with override if intentional.
pharmacy_po_detail.confirm_override: Override expiry warning and confirm anyway?

pharmacy_report_expiry.title: Expiry report
pharmacy_report_expiry.empty: No items expiring in this window.

pharmacy_serve_warn.title: Expired medicine — confirm serve
pharmacy_serve_warn.body: The following items are linked to inventory that is past its expiry date. Serving them requires pharmacist override.
pharmacy_serve_warn.confirm_override: Override expiry warning and mark selected as served?

tax_cnps.title: CNPS / DIPE
tax_cnps.subtitle: Builds lines from tbl_hms_payroll_record and employer settings. Confirm layout with CNPS before filing.
tax_cnps.generate_hint: Requires at least one employee with gross > 0 for the period.

tax_compliance.title: Payroll compliance calendar
tax_compliance.subtitle: Headcount per month and how many lines are marked paid.

tax_dgi.title: DGI payroll exports
tax_dgi.subtitle: Semicolon-separated CSV (UTF-8 BOM), aligned with the legacy PHP HmsDgiGenerator layout. Validate with your accountant or DGI before filing.
tax_dgi.monthly_desc: Summary row plus per-employee gross, IRPP, and net.
tax_dgi.annual_desc: Totals grouped by employee for the calendar year (includes employee NIU when the column exists).
tax_dgi.alt_hint_prefix: For a simple comma-separated extract (different columns), use

employee_doctor.specialisation_hint: Choose from the list or add a new clinical specialty. New entries are saved for future doctors.

employee_hr.job_title_hint: Leave blank to use role title on payslip.
employee_hr.account_no_hint: Masked on printed payslip (last 4 digits visible).

module_odoo.admin_banner: Signed in as Admin / Super Admin — the accounting bar shows your full menu, not another role's Navigation Studio layout.
